channel.title: Ribose Limited — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Ribose Limited (ribose).

item.title: CVE-2025-13470 · 7.7 HIGH 🌩️ — RNP 0.18.0 Vulnerable PKESK session keys
item.description: In RNP version 0.18.0 a refactoring regression causes the symmetric session key used for Public-Key Encrypted Session Key (PKESK) packets to be left uninitialized except for zeroing, resulting in it always being an all-zero byte array. Any data encry…
